title: Tall Lands
description: Makes Minecraft's terrain "tall". Something like the farlands.
body:
# Tall Lands

### NOTE: make sure you explicitly pick which version you download, especially if you downloaded one and it doesn't seem to be doing anything; 1.faraway.0 is FARAWAY tall lands.

*a Mixin Subproject*

> **compatible with basically everything, and affects all data packs and basically all mods.**  
> (unless the other mod writes its own world generator noise sampler)  
> **I recommend using this as part of a modpack if said modpack is boring by itself.**

Part of Minecraft's world generation sampling code involves dividing a number by 128 before returning it. All I did was removed this divisor, and the results are very cool. It almost turns Minecraft into a completely different challenge.

This mod shouldn't necessarily require a beefier CPU, but I haven't tested. It seems to generate terrain at the same speed, though.

![showcase of overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5439e73e9960405d7ece6a66eca472cb911bfcd9.webp)

![showcase of overworld, top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71919f6af8042f22ce93a594c188c6f0d6005332.webp)

![showcase of overworld, top, forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3ffe23a8e93b04ae13fb5a41ae0335b5337a614.webp)

![showcase of overworld, desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c616bd3f5bee80a135a29daf921002400ae830b.webp)

![showcase of overworld, cherry grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/212968d21c5438546b894844eeb7f38c8de7f4a1.webp)

![showcase of overworld, blocky cave stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8949019d2f63ef0df91cfdf4d1a919e5b7ba93d.webp)

![showcase of overworld, from ocean surface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13c65c56ecb45e4d57107ecf2a71946049d48796.webp)

![showcase of overworld at night, sides of terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ed6f9231ef37ee32100ccad5b82127c64e3d743.webp)

![showcase of overworld at night, top, surfaced ocean ruin and plains village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e07ee5ef8010ebc8995bfc4cd74e3279f827a518.webp)

I didn't test the nether previously, but apparently it's also affected...

![showcase of nether roof above crimson forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03b746a6ed4298e7873ae7064fa31a5df265454a.webp)

(yes, the nether roof has holes now.)

![showcase of nether, soul sand valley and crimson forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfb9ce92d999736bd0b42cd9c2714f24eaba9120.webp)

![showcase of nether, basalt deltas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f67df99f449ca2c7ffaf0bee6cf2e6732920c00.webp)

![showcase of nether, warped forest and bastion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c49d1a2f2f8b15849f271f02275c8f4a5b8fb388.webp)

<details>
<summary>The End (spoiler?)</summary>

the End is very cool as well...

![showcase of the End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a875b8a29b8cb38f59fa6fb73a9254cdf47d893.webp)

...but also a bit broken.

![showcase of the End main island with pllars embedded in the island](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6401c4528298db41ef24fe44d917f72cbc5f4a0.webp)

It is fully possible (in theory) to beat the game with this mod.

</details>
